sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after clicking on the green U-shape inside the green container (node 14 at center 21, 45.1)
bt = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
at = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation
before_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in bt['nodes']}
after_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in at['nodes']}
for nid in after_nodes:
    if nid in before_nodes:
        bn = before_nodes[nid]
        an = after_nodes[nid]
        if an['color'] != bn['color'] or an['pixels'] != bn['pixels']:
            msg = "Node %d: color %s->%s, pixels %d->%d" % (nid, bn['color'], an['color'], bn['pixels'], an['pixels'])
            print(msg)
</parameter>

    "current_plan": "Inspect changes after clicking yellow objects",
    "open_questions": ["What happens when I click on them?"],

}
</parameter>
